work_order.title: Emergency Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Immediate action required due to Grade 1 leak detected.
isolation_protocol: Immediate action required based on Leak Grade Classification Criteria.
Proactive notification of affected occupants/facility and coordination with local fire and emergency services is required because the leak is Grade 1 and results in an escalation.
Re-grade immediately if subsequent surveys show elevated concentration, new construction changing surface capping, or new occupancy within HCA proximity threshold.
ppe_required: Notification and coordination with local fire and emergency services.
Internal gas-control notification to affected occupants/facility.
proximity_hazards: The leak is located 8.0m from a building, which is within the threshold used as a proxy for HCA proximity (≤20m).
work_order.crew_summary: Response initiated based on multi-signal corroboration of gas and pressure readings.

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Scheduled repair required due to leak detection.
isolation_protocol: Dispatch crew to the nearest upstream and downstream isolation valves for the affected segment; isolate the segment per the segment's MAOP and valve-spacing record.
ppe_required: Eliminate ignition sources in the affected area immediately: no smoking, no electrical switches, no vehicle ignition within the hazard radius.

Evacuate and ventilate any structure where gas has migrated or is suspected to have migrated (paved-capping cases); open doors/windows if safe to do so; do not use powered ventilation equipment that could itself be an ignition source.
proximity_hazards: The leak is near occupancy (distance to building: 45.0 m).
Surface capping type is soil, which is permeable to gas and typically results in vertical venting if away from occupancy.

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Gas leak detected in segment SEG-003.
isolation_protocol: Dispatch crew to the nearest upstream and downstream isolation valves for the affected segment; isolate the segment per the segment's MAOP and valve-spacing record.
Human approval gate: dispatch of field crew for physical isolation requires human confirmation of the recommended action before execution — no autonomous valve isolation (maturity level L3).

Continuous atmosphere monitoring at the leak site and in any structure within the migration radius using intrinsically safe gas detectors until concentration is confirmed below 20% of LEL and trending down.
ppe_required: Eliminate ignition sources in the affected area immediately: no smoking, no electrical switches, no vehicle ignition within the hazard radius.

Evacuate and ventilate any structure where gas has migrated or is suspected to have migrated (paved-capping cases); open doors/windows if safe to do so; do not use powered ventilation equipment that could itself be an ignition source.
work_order.crew_summary: Monitoring required due to low concentration and location away from occupancy, consistent with Grade 3 criteria.

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order: Gas Leak Response
work_order.situation_summary: Immediate hazard identified due to gas leak requiring immediate action.
isolation_protocol: Eliminate ignition sources in the affected area immediately: no smoking, no electrical switches, no vehicle ignition within the hazard radius.

Evacuate and ventilate any structure where gas has migrated or is suspected to have migrated (paved-capping cases); open doors/windows if safe to do so; do not use powered ventilation equipment that could itself be an ignition source.
Establish isolation: dispatch crew to the nearest upstream and downstream isolation valves for the affected segment; isolate the segment per the segment's MAOP and valve-spacing record.

Continuous atmosphere monitoring at the leak site and in any structure within the migration radius using intrinsically safe gas detectors until concentration is confirmed below 20% of LEL and trending down.
ppe_required: Notify emergency services and gas control center immediately; declare a gas emergency per the utility's emergency response plan; target response time is sub-30-minute arrival on site.
proximity_hazards: The leak involves paved capping (concrete), which forces lateral migration, resulting in an immediate hazard.
Location class is 3 with HCA flag set to True.
work_order.crew_summary: Dispatch crew must be dispatched for physical isolation requires human confirmation of the recommended action before execution (no autonomous valve isolation, maturity level L3).

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Monitoring of gas leak at segment SEG-005A.
isolation_protocol: Monitor conditions as per Grade 3 criteria.
No immediate shutdown or physical isolation is required based on current monitoring, consistent with the grading rule: unpaved, low concentration, away from occupancy -> monitor/re-evaluate.
The leak is classified as Grade 3 (monitor) according to [gas-leak-response-procedures_sec1_0].
work_order.crew_summary: Inspection conducted between 22:07:00 and 22:12:00 UTC. Peak methane concentration was 13.59% LEL, and peak acoustic index was 0.3383.

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Gas leak detected under paved capping in SEG-005B.
isolation_protocol: Eliminate ignition sources in the affected area immediately (no smoking, no electrical switches, no vehicle ignition within the hazard radius) [gas-leak-response-procedures_sec3_0]

Evacuate and ventilate any structure where gas has migrated or is suspected to have migrated (paved-capping cases); open doors/windows if safe to do so; do not use powered ventilation equipment that could itself be an ignition source [gas-leak-response_procedures_sec3_0]
ppe_required: Establish isolation: dispatch crew to the nearest upstream and downstream isolation valves for the affected segment; isolate the segment per the segment's MAOP and valve-spacing record [gas-leak-response_procedures_sec3_0]
proximity_hazards: Leak is under paved capping, which forces lateral migration -> immediate hazard [gas-leak-response_procedures_sec2_0]
Confinement type (below_pavement) combined with paved capping is the highest-migration-risk configuration and always escalates to Grade 1 under this scheme [gas-leak-response_procedures_sec2_0]
work_order.crew_summary: Continuous atmosphere monitoring at the leak site and in any structure within the migration radius using intrinsically safe gas detectors until concentration is confirmed below 20% of LEL and trending down [gas-leak-response_procedures_sec3_0]

work_order.title: Emergency Leak Verification Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Leak detected in segment SEG-006 with Grade 1 priority.
isolation_protocol: Segment shutoff has already been isolated automatically (confirmed, latency 0.401s). No re-isolation instruction is necessary.
proximity_hazards: The location has a High Consequence Area (HCA) flag set (hca_flag: True).
Distance to building (5.0m) is within the threshold used as a proxy for HCA proximity (e.g., ≤20m).
work_order.crew_summary: Verification and monitoring required due to Grade 1 classification.
